title: GimmiFullBright
description: A simple server-side mod that adds a /fullbright command to toggle night vision without particles.
body:
# [GimmiFullBright](https://github.com/nandhu-44/GimmiFullBright)

A simple server-side mod for NeoForge that adds a `/fullbright` command to toggle night vision without particles.

## Features

- Server-side only mod (no need to install on client)
- Adds `/fullbright` command with enable/disable options
- No particle effects from the night vision effect
- Broadcasts who enables/disables fullbright to all players
- Available to all players (no special permissions needed)
- Colored chat messages for better visibility

## Commands

- `/fullbright enable` - Enables fullbright mode (infinite night vision without particles)
- `/fullbright disable` - Disables fullbright mode

## Installation

1. Install NeoForge 1.21.1 (requires version 21.1.172 or higher)
2. Download the mod jar file
3. Place the jar file in your server's `mods` folder
4. Restart your server

## Permissions

The command can be used by all players, no special permissions required.

## Usage Example

```sql
/fullbright enable  -- Enables fullbright mode
/fullbright disable -- Disables fullbright mode
```

## Server Console

The mod logs all fullbright toggle actions to the server console for monitoring.
